backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and state for a workout tracker app, including user profiles, phases, exercises, workout sessions, and templates, with access control via a mixin authorization module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature: removing the 4th anchor link from the navigation bar in the Layout component, referencing the affected file and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Workout Tracker app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with seven routes (history, add, progression, templates, phases, workout-templates, workout-log), wraps the app in a ThemeProvider, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CreateTemplateFo: Form component for creating a new workout template with a name input field, validation, and submit/cancel buttons that call the useCreateWorkoutTemplate mutation hook.
Component for viewing and logging sets for a specific exercise, displaying past log entries and a form to add new ones with weight conversion between the user's preferred unit and the stored lbs base unit.
frontend/src/components/ExerciseSelector: Dropdown select component that renders a list of exercise names and calls a callback when the user selects one, returning null if no exercises are available.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a hero header, sticky navigation bar, and an Outlet for child routes. Shows auth-gated nav links (History, Templates, Progression) and always-visible links based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/components/LogEntryForm.tsx: Form component for logging actual workout performance (sets, reps, weight) against a planned WorkoutLog. Supports saving progress and marking the workout as complete, with toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
Displays exercises within a training phase, allowing users to add or remove exercises and navigate into an individual ExerciseLogView. Includes loading skeletons and toast notifications for mutations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to newly authenticated users to collect their name and preferred weight unit (lbs/kg) and save a user profile via the backend. Prevents dismissal until the profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: Renders tabbed Recharts line and bar charts (volume, weight, reps, sets) for a given exercise's workout history, converting stored weights to the user's preferred unit.
frontend/src/components/TemplateCreateFo: A form component for creating a new workout template with a name and a dynamic list of exercises (sets, reps, weight, time), using local storage via `useCreateLocalTemplate` and displaying toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/TemplateDetailVi: Displays the details of a workout template (scheduled days, exercises) and provides an inline form to add new exercises to the template via `useAddExerciseToTemplate`.
frontend/src/components/WeightUnitToggle: A toggle button component that lets the user switch between lbs and kg weight units, reading and saving the preference through the user profile hooks.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutEntryForm: A form for logging a single workout session (day, exercise, sets, reps, weight, duration, notes), converting weight to lbs before submission via `useAddWorkout`.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutHistoryLi: Fetches and displays the user's workout history grouped by day of the week, converting stored lbs weights to the user's preferred unit for display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating all dependent queries whenever the actor (identity) changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddExerciseToPhase: A mutation hook that calls `actor.addExerciseToPhase` and invalidates the exercises query for the given phase on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddExerciseToTempl: A mutation hook that calls `actor.addExerciseToTemplate` and invalidates the `allWorkoutTemplates` query on success, throwing on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddWorkout.ts: A mutation hook that submits a `WorkoutSession` to the backend and invalidates the `workoutHistory` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePhase.ts: A mutation hook that creates a new training phase by name and invalidates the `phases` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateWorkoutTempl: A mutation hook that creates a new workout template via the backend actor and invalidates the `allWorkoutTemplates` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePhase.ts: A mutation hook that deletes a training phase by ID and invalidates the `phases` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllWorkoutTempl: A query hook that fetches all workout templates for the current user from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with loading state derived from both actor and query states.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetExerciseLogs.ts: React Query hook that fetches exercise logs for a given exercise ID from the backend actor, returning results sorted by date descending.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetExercisesForPha: React Query hook that fetches all exercises belonging to a specific phase ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPhases.ts: React Query hook that fetches all training phases from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalLogs.ts: React Query hooks for reading, updating, completing, and deleting workout logs stored in localStorage, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalTemplates.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on workout templates stored in localStorage, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useLogExercise.ts: Mutation hook that logs an exercise (sets, reps, weight) to the backend actor and invalidates the relevant exercise logs cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file indicating that all query logic has been moved to individual hook files.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveExercise.ts: Mutation hook that removes an exercise from the backend actor and invalidates the exercises cache for the associated phase.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend actor and invalidates the user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWorkoutHistory.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's workout history from the backend actor, sorted in reverse chronological order.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a light/dark theme design system including colors, radius, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddWorkoutPage.tsx: Page component that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users or renders the WorkoutEntryForm for authenticated users to log a workout.
frontend/src/pages/LocalTemplatesPage.ts: Page component for managing local workout templates, supporting listing, creating, viewing details, and deleting templates stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/PhasesPage.tsx: Page for managing training phases, allowing authenticated users to create, delete, and navigate into phase detail views, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressionPage.tsx: Page that displays workout progression analytics for authenticated users, letting them select an exercise and view a chart of filtered, sorted workout history data.
frontend/src/pages/TemplateLibraryPage.t: Page for browsing, creating, and viewing workout templates, gating access behind authentication and switching between list, create form, and detail views.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutHistoryPage.ts: Page that shows the full workout history list for authenticated users, or a login prompt card for unauthenticated visitors.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutLogPage.tsx: Page for managing local workout logs with filtering, stats, delete confirmation dialogs, and a detail view for entering actual exercise performance data.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageLogs.ts: Utility module providing CRUD operations for workout logs persisted in localStorage, including creating logs from templates, updating actuals, marking complete, and deleting.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageTemplates: Utility module providing CRUD operations for workout templates persisted in localStorage, automatically creating a corresponding log entry when a new template is saved.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/weightConversion.ts: Provides functions to convert between lbs and kg, format weight values, and display stored lb weights in a specified unit.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and custom keyframes for accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a fitness/workout logging app, listing existing features (removed 4th nav link) and pending feature requests (per-workout lb/kg toggle, remove duplicate nav link).
